message:
refactor(agent): eliminate redundant clones via move semantics in event dispatch

Reorder agent event dispatch so extension lifecycle events receive the
event by shared reference first, then the event is moved into on_event()
instead of cloned.  This removes ~10 unnecessary .clone() calls per
agent run in the main event loop.

Key changes:
- Swap ordering: dispatch_extension_lifecycle_event(&event) now runs
  before on_event(event) at every emit site (AgentStart, TurnStart,
  TurnEnd, AgentEnd)
- Replace new_messages.clone() with std::mem::take(&mut new_messages)
  in all AgentEnd event constructors, avoiding deep-copy of the full
  message history on every terminal path
- Final AgentEnd at loop exit uses plain move (new_messages) since the
  vec is not accessed afterward

No behavioral change — only allocation/copy elimination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
